errTypes.notFound: Couldn't find that. I must be blind.
errTypes.unauthorized: Stop, you can't go here. This is forbidden territory for unauthenticated adventurers.
errTypes.forbidden: There's barbed wire here – access denied, even for superadmins with cheat codes.
errTypes.server: The server took a coffee break. Try again later.
errTypes.badRequest: Your request is as confused as a draft article without a title – try writing it clearly.
errTypes.tooManyRequests: Spam alert! You're clicking faster than a speedrunner – take a break.
errTypes.internalError: Something exploded inside like a poorly written script. Our technomages are on it.
errTypes.serviceUnavailable: The service went on vacation. Refresh the page or have some tea in the meantime.
errTypes.conflict: The data is arguing like two editors over one article. Decide which version wins.
errTypes.notAcceptable: This is against the rules of the game. Edit the content and try again.
errTypes.gatewayTimeout: The gateway got stuck like a lagging server. Wait a moment and try again.
errTypes.unprocessableEntity: We don't understand this, like an AI with a bad prompt. Add more details and it'll work.

hero.subtitle: Boost organic traffic and build your brand without hiring an army of writers. A complete publishing platform that pays for itself via ad revenue sharing.

specs.title: Less Hassle, More Results
specs.subtitle: Topiqu isn't just an editor. It's a complete ecosystem handling content creation, distribution, and monetization for you.

ai.title: AI That Understands Your Business
ai.desc: Our engine learns your tone-of-voice and brand identity. It generates relevant articles that actually attract customers, not just generic text. Automatically monitors discussion quality and community sentiment.

monetization.title: Self-Funding Tool
monetization.desc: Unique Google Ad Manager (GAM) revenue sharing model. The higher quality your content and traffic, the more you earn back. Your blog becomes a profitable channel.

api.title: Deploy in Minutes
api.desc: No complex development. Embed a link on your site, use our plugin, or fetch data via API to display it your way. Fully customizable design, colors, and domain.

pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing. No hidden fees. Choose the level that matches your ambition.

free.name: Free
free.desc: Perfect for beginners and hobby projects.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For creators who want to grow with AI.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Topiqu platform. From domain setup to AI generation and monetization.
faq.cta_desc: Our support team is here for you 24/7.

items.q: How does the revenue share model work?
items.a: Topiqu rewards creators based on their plan. With the FREE tier, 100% of ad revenue goes to platform operations. The PRO plan offers a 70/30 split in your favor, and PREMIUM increases this share to 90/10.

items.q: Can I use Topiqu on my own domain?
items.a: Yes. Starting from the PRO plan, you can use your own subdomain (e.g., blog.yourcompany.com) via CNAME record. The CUSTOM plan unlocks deployment on an apex domain.

items.q: Is AI-generated content safe for SEO?
items.a: Absolutely. We use advanced Grok 4.1 Fast Reasoning models to generate content that is strictly optimized for search engines. Algorithms automatically structure articles and monitor keywords.

items.q: What analytics tools does the platform offer?
items.a: Besides GA4 integration, we provide our own detailed metrics for B2B blogging. We track engagement rate, community sentiment in comments, and author activity.

items.q: Can I upgrade my plan at any time?
items.a: Of course. Plan upgrades are instant, and AI tokens or new features (like custom domains) become available immediately upon confirmation.

performance.title:
Speed That
Google Loves.
performance.subtitle: Technology fades into the background. What matters is the reader experience and search engine ranking. We guarantee both.

stack.title: Maximum Performance
stack.desc: Optimized for Core Web Vitals. Your articles load instantly, improving conversion rates and reducing bounce rates.

analytics.title: Data for Decisions
analytics.desc: Clear reports on what your readers actually engage with. Engagement rate, shares, and business impact in one dashboard.

pricing.title: Fair Pricing
pricing.desc: Base platform fee + flexible add-ons based on your usage. You don't pay for features you don't need.

onboarding.title: Create your own blog

targetAudience.example: E.g., 'Young adults 18–25 years', 'Game developers and IT professionals'.

keywords.description: Prominent topics or terms to appear more frequently in outputs. Also used for SEO.
keywords.example: E.g., 'Unreal Engine, AI in games, RPG, player freedom'.

engagementRate.title: Engagement Rate
engagementRate.tooltip: Engagement rate shows how actively readers interact with your articles. It is calculated as the average ratio of interactions (likes, comments, shares, and poll votes) to views for each article. A higher value indicates greater reader engagement.

tos.title: Terms of Service
tos.description: Terms of service for our platform.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content:
By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. In addition, when using these particular services, you shall be subject to any posted guidelines or rules applicable to such services.

Any participation in this service will constitute acceptance of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.

sections.title: 2. Provision of Services
sections.content: You agree and acknowledge that we are entitled to modify, improve or discontinue any of our services at its sole discretion and without notice to you even if it may result in you being prevented from accessing any information contained in it. Furthermore, you agree and acknowledge that we are entitled to provide services to you through subsidiaries or affiliated entities.

sections.title: 3. Proprietary Rights
sections.content:
You acknowledge and agree that our website may contain proprietary and confidential information including trademarks, service marks and patents protected by intellectual property laws and international intellectual property treaties.

We authorize you to view and make a single copy of portions of its content for offline, personal, non-commercial use. Our content may not be sold, reproduced, or distributed without our written permission.

sections.title: 4. Termination of Agreement
sections.content: The Terms of this agreement will continue to apply in perpetuity until terminated by either party without notice at any time for any reason. Terms that are to continue in perpetuity shall be unaffected by the termination of this agreement.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content:
We collect information to provide better services to all our users. We collect information in the following ways:
  • Information you give us. For example, our services require you to sign up for an account. When you do, we'll ask for personal information, like your name, email address, or telephone number.
  • Information we get from your use of our services. We collect information about the services that you use and how you use them.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Information
sections.content:
We use the information we collect from all of our services to provide, maintain, protect and improve them, to develop new ones, and to protect our users. We also use this information to offer you tailored content – like giving you more relevant search results and ads.

We will ask for your consent before using information for a purpose other than those that are set out in this Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 3. Information We Share
sections.content:
We do not share personal information with companies, organizations and individuals outside of our company unless one of the following circumstances applies:
  • With your consent. We will share personal information with companies, organizations or individuals outside of our company when we have your consent to do so.
  • For legal reasons. We will share personal information if we have a good-faith belief that access, use, preservation or disclosure of the information is reasonably necessary.

sections.title: 4. Information Security
sections.content:
We work hard to protect our users from unauthorized access to or unauthorized alteration, disclosure or destruction of information we hold. In particular:
  • We encrypt many of our services using SSL.
  • We review our information collection, storage and processing practices, including physical security measures, to guard against unauthorized access to systems.
